vision: Track every meaningful AI development tool on GitHub.

platform_metrics.knowledge_graph_edges_status: needs verification — sampled but not totalled on 2026-04-24
platform_metrics.db_backend: Cloud SQL (PostgreSQL + pgvector) — migrated from Neon on 2026-04-15
platform_metrics.external_integrations: Workato (3 recipes), MCP (Claude Code + HTTP bridge)

working.name: reporium.com v0.7.0
working.evidence: Live (HTTP 200). Latest commit 2026-04-23 — FAQ page (PR #272 in flight), inline citation linking, jellyfish hover tooltips, security hotfix #264 took down 44 leaked private repos from library.json. Banner stickiness fix shipped. Progressive loading (owned.json + library.json) still in place. Last release tag v0.7.0.

working.name: reporium-api v1.6.0
working.evidence: Cloud Run, /health 200 ok (verified 2026-04-24). Live /library/full reports 1,856 repos; /graph/edges reports 1,895 total / 1,768 with embeddings. 39 alembic migrations on head (039_query_log_query_id). /intelligence/ask + smart routing + follow-up suggestion chips live. DB backend is Cloud SQL (migrated from Neon 2026-04-15). Main HEAD 58ab8cd (#433). NullPool-safe /health pool telemetry is in PR #435 — open, pending merge as of 2026-04-24. Last tag v1.6.0; openapi reports app version 1.1.0 — version drift between tag and FastAPI app — flagged for follow-up.

working.name: reporium-mcp
working.evidence: MCP server giving Claude/Workato direct access to the live library. 18 tools across 7 modules (search, taxonomy, intelligence, graph, quality, repos, …). HTTP bridge deployed to Cloud Run via cloudbuild.http.yaml (KAN-163). Migrated to Workload Identity Federation; deploy auth probe replaced ID-token smoke test. Used by 3 Workato recipes.

working.name: reporium-ingestion v1.3.0
working.evidence: Cloud Run Job for nightly enrichment proven end-to-end (181 repos / 0 errors on first scheduled fire). Legacy GitHub Actions enrichment cron removed (PR #65). Graph-build CI surfaces Cloud Run Job diagnostics on failure (PRs #66 and follow-up). Tag v1.3.0; head 025a60b.

working.name: forksync
working.evidence: Cloud Run nightly sync. Cache migrated from Cloud Memorystore to Upstash Redis REST API (PR #1). SYNC_REPORT.md still committed after each run.

working.name: reporium-db v1.0.0
working.evidence: Nightly sync. {db_total} repos in published index.json across {db_languages} languages. Stronger GraphQL 5xx resilience landed today (f3a099e). 403 retry with 300s Retry-After cap (PR #10) live since 2026-04.

working.name: reporium-events v1.0.0
working.evidence: Now public on GitHub (was local-only as of 2026-03). GCP Pub/Sub topic 'reporium-events' live. 8 event schemas (sync.completed, db.synced, ingestion.completed, repo.added, repo.updated, health.check, build.failed, api.deployed). Async Firestore transactional fix shipped (PR #2).

working.name: reporium-audit
working.evidence: Nightly 8am UTC audit of all platform components, AUDIT_REPORT.md auto-generated. Knowledge graph edge count regression check added (4ddc6dd).

working.name: perditio-devkit
working.evidence: Shared tooling: badges, GitHub client, file utilities, reusable test failure workflow. Used by all suite repos.

not_working.name: openapi version drift
not_working.reason: Live /openapi.json reports app version 1.1.0 while git tag is v1.6.0. Symptom of FastAPI `version=` constant being out of date. Cosmetic but breaks any external consumer that reads openapi for version pinning.

not_working.name: knowledge-graph edge total — not verified on 2026-04-24
not_working.reason: Older roadmap claimed 6,209 edges on a 1,406-repo corpus. Corpus is now 1,856 and ALTERNATIVE_TO is the only edge type observed in a sampled /graph/edges call. A current total has not been measured this cycle. needs verification.

sdlc.workflow: Git Flow — feature/fix branches from main (per current dispatch contract), PR to main, semver tags on main

branches.main: stable, deployable; PR target for all lanes
branches.claude/feature/KAN-*-*: feature branches owned by a single dispatch lane
branches.hotfix/*: emergency production fixes (e.g. SEC-HOTFIX #264 — leaked private repo takedown)

sdlc.versioning: semver — PATCH=bugfix, MINOR=new feature, MAJOR=breaking change
sdlc.events: Publish to reporium-events GCP Pub/Sub on significant pipeline completions (8 event types)
sdlc.jira_first: JIRA-first contract — every lane carries a KAN-* ticket or .audit/<date>/<lane>-jira.md fallback

fixing_now.name: Ask UX trust + safety hardening
fixing_now.description: Lane-coordinated work across 8+ parallel lanes (2026-04-24): NullPool-safe /health (PR #435), stale Cloud Run candidate-tag cleanup (PR #436), library stats fix (PR #438), forbidden_repos primitive (PR #439), FAQ product decision (PR #272), Data Quality Check workflow verification.

fixing_now.name: Roadmap sync (this PR)
fixing_now.description: Update reporium-roadmap to reflect validated 2026-04-24 suite state: corpus 1,406 → 1,856, Neon → Cloud SQL, reporium-mcp added as working, reporium-events now public, alembic head 004 → 039. NullPool /health softened to 'PR #435 open, pending merge'. Adds `solved_lanes` list so future runs do not re-open today's closed P2s, Neon→Cloud SQL, reporium-events, reporium-mcp, forksync, or SEC-HOTFIX #264. Original 10K/100K corpus targets acknowledged as missed.

items: Resolve openapi/tag version drift in reporium-api
Re-measure knowledge-graph edge totals after 2026-04 enrichment work
Audit suite hardening + Workato recipe validation (lanes 9–10 from today's dispatch)
Honest restatement of corpus growth targets — original 10K-by-end-of-March / 100K-by-end-of-April were not met (current ~1,856). New targets need product input.

coming_next.name: repo-intelligence
coming_next.description: 0-100 repo scorer: README, activity, community, CI. Pip-installable. Status: planned (no recent CI runs as of 2026-04-09 audit).

coming_next.name: github-ai-trends
coming_next.description: Daily GitHub trending scraper for AI repos. Feeds new repo candidates to reporium-db. Status: planned.

coming_next.name: reporium frontend v2
coming_next.description: Figma-designed UI: faster, cleaner, better filtering. Status: planned.

solved_lanes.note: Lanes resolved on or before 2026-04-24. Future runs MUST NOT re-propose these without first checking the referenced PR/commit. Source of truth for 'do not re-open' is this list plus `project_reporium_p2_resolved_apr24.md` in auto-memory.

entries.summary: `fix(tests): make _setup_db teardown non-fatal (kills flaky main CI)`. Closes the P2 that had main CI failing on teardown.

entries.lane: legacy GitHub Actions nightly enrichment cron
entries.summary: `chore(nightly): remove legacy GitHub Actions enrichment cron`. Cloud Run Job is now the sole nightly enrichment path (proven end-to-end 2026-04-22).

`fix: intelligent GitHub 403 retry with 300s Retry-After cap`. The 5xx-resilience companion patch (`f3a099e`) is in a feature branch (`claude/fix/graphql-502-resilience`); it is not yet on main as of 2026-04-24 and is tracked under `next_up`.
Full migration to Cloud SQL f1-micro. Reference: `project_neon_quota_migration.md`. Do not re-propose Neon work.

entries.resolved_by: GitHub publication + PR #2 (Firestore async txn fix)
entries.summary: Repo is public; 8 event schemas live; async Firestore txn fix shipped. Do not re-propose 'push reporium-events to GitHub'.

entries.lane: reporium-mcp HTTP bridge + Workload Identity Federation
entries.summary: Workload Identity Federation replaces GCP_SA_KEY; deploy smoke replaced by auth-enforcement probe; cloudbuild.http.yaml for Cloud Run HTTP bridge. Do not re-propose SA_KEY or cloudbuild.yaml-only deploy.
Cache moved from Cloud Memorystore to Upstash Redis REST API. Do not re-propose Memorystore path.
44 leaked private repo entries removed from public library.json. Do not re-propose removal — already shipped.

backlog.name: reporium-trending
backlog.description: Multi-source trend aggregation across GitHub, LinkedIn, X. Requires dedicated infrastructure.

changelog.notes: Roadmap sync to validated 2026-04-24 suite reality. Corpus updated 1,406 → 1,856 (live API /library/full). DB backend Neon → Cloud SQL (migrated 2026-04-15, KAN-120). reporium-mcp added to working list (HTTP bridge on Cloud Run, 18 tools, WIF deploy, used by 3 Workato recipes). reporium-events moved from 'local only' to public on GitHub. Alembic head 004 → 039 (039_query_log_query_id). openapi/tag version drift in reporium-api (openapi reports 1.1.0, tag v1.6.0) flagged in not_working. Knowledge-graph edge total marked needs-verification (no current measurement). Per-repo HEAD commits pinned: reporium-api 58ab8cd, reporium-ingestion 4c5f2f3 (v1.3.0 at cd9fb16), reporium-mcp d5b6d11, reporium-events 81a51fd. NullPool-safe /health softened to 'PR #435 open, pending merge as of 2026-04-24'. reporium-db evidence corrected: 403-retry-with-cap (PR #10) is on main; the GraphQL 5xx companion (`f3a099e`) is on a feature branch only. New `solved_lanes` array enumerates 8 already-shipped lanes (3 P2s closed today + Neon→Cloud SQL + reporium-events publication + reporium-mcp WIF + forksync Upstash + SEC-HOTFIX #264) so future runs do not re-open them. Original 10K/100K corpus targets acknowledged as missed; new targets pending product input. Lane work for 2026-04-24 dispatch summarized in fixing_now.

AskBar: natural language Q&A over repo library via public /intelligence/ask endpoint (rate limited). Progressive loading: owned.json (690KB) renders in ~0.5s, library.json (5.3MB) merges in background — 87% first-paint payload reduction. CI/CD auto-deploy on push to main for reporium-api. DB migrations 003+004 applied (is_private, stargazers_count). CORS restricted. GH_TOKEN wired for commit stats. PR #16 merged (tag cloud status filter). Issues #27, #30 closed. reporium-api v1.6.0, reporium v0.7.0.
MetricsSidebar LIBRARY BY CATEGORY fixed: normalizedCategories passed so stale Audio/Deployment entries no longer appear. jest worktree exclusion added. reporium v0.6.1 tagged.

Repo card fixes: system tags removed, category aliases, builder badge, timeline guard. Filter bar stale category normalization. AI Dev Coverage badges all green. Builders section restored. Prompt injection prevention + SQL injection fix in reporium-api. 32 unit tests. SDLC: Git Flow established, dev branch on all repos, CONTRIBUTING.md, semver releases.
reporium-api security: private repo exposure fixed (is_private column, WHERE is_private=false). Redis Memorystore cache enabled via VPC connector. CI workflows across suite.
reporium-api deployed to Cloud Run, reporium-events Pub/Sub system, reporium-audit nightly health checks, perditio-devkit shared tooling.
reporium-db, reporium-dataset, reporium-metrics, portfolio, repo-intelligence all launched.
forksync v2 launched on Cloud Run (68s for 818 repos).

historical_targets.claim: 10K repos by end of March 2026; 100K by end of April 2026
historical_targets.outcome_as_of_2026_04_24: Not met. Live API reports 1,856 repos. Targets recorded here so the original ambition is not silently rewritten; replacement targets are pending product input.
